_doc: Machine-readable manifest for the professional public-data evidence pack. Canonical row-level inventory is source_catalog.csv; runtime field mapping is generated in processed/field_provenance_2026-07-17.csv.

policies.point_in_time: Any evidence with purpose=pre_decision must have published_at on or before event.information_cutoff.
policies.citation: Every runtime-required field must map to a verified source_id.
policies.basis: Actual and estimate must share an explicit comparable basis; GAAP and adjusted EPS are never mixed.
policies.event_window: PTT price reaction is labeled analyst_meeting_update, not earnings_release.
policies.no_fabrication: Unavailable licensed consensus is reported as unavailable and never replaced with an unlabeled proxy.

known_external_dependencies.impact: Official release and slides are sufficient for numeric I/O; full tone/Q&A NLP needs a licensed transcript or manual transcription of the official replay.
